---
id: get-current
title: "Return current PAK"
description: "Returns current Personal Access Token. If the request is not authenticated with a Personal Access Token, it will return 400 response status."
sidebar_label: "Return current PAK"
hide_title: true

  children={"Return current PAK"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/v2/pats/current"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Returns current Personal Access Token. If the request is not authenticated with a Personal Access Token, it will return 400 response status.
